description: An MCP server that exposes getMe key-value operations as MCP tools
name: io.github.AatirNadim/getme-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Path to the UNIX socket for getMe core server
environmentVariables.name: GETME_SOCKET_PATH

environmentVariables.description: If true, only get and get_json tools are registered
environmentVariables.name: GETME_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: If true, enables the dangerous clear tool
environmentVariables.name: GETME_ALLOW_CLEAR

environmentVariables.description: String prefix prepended to all keys (e.g. agent1:)
environmentVariables.name: GETME_KEY_PREFIX

title: getMe MCP Server
